overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Mirage showing a hooded protagonist navigating through a historic Middle Eastern city (Baghdad). The character moves from narrow stone streets lined with palm fronds into open courtyards with fountains, then enters a decorated building with an ornate interior garden courtyard featuring Islamic architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone street with palm fronds opening to fountain courtyard

events.description: exits narrow stone passage into open courtyard with central fountain
character transitions from walking to brief jog while approaching courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow stone passage lined with palm fronds and flower beds, emerging into a sunlit courtyard

notable_agents.action: woman in dark robes walking alongside the path
man in green robes standing near flower beds

entered.detail: tall sandstone building wall with weathered texture
tall sandstone building wall with arched doorways
large dried palm fronds stacked against the wall
circular stone fountain with water feature
teal fabric awnings strung between buildings
ornate stone building with Islamic geometric patterns and blue tilework

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow stone street flanked by high sandstone walls and palm fronds. The character walks forward, emerging into an open courtyard with a central fountain. The space transitions from enclosed to open, revealing decorated buildings with blue fabric canopies in the distance. Pedestrians in period clothing walk through the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open courtyard with central fountain and decorated building entrance

events.description: character turns left to circle around the fountain
character ascends stone steps toward building entrance

agents.ego_description: circling the central fountain and approaching the large decorated building entrance with blue banners

notable_agents.action: child running across the courtyard toward the fountain
group of merchants standing near baskets of pink flowers

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading to building entrance
decorative teal fabric drapes hanging from building facade
rough timber scaffolding against the building wall
large baskets overflowing with pink flower petals

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open courtyard, passing the central fountain on the left and approaching a grand building entrance adorned with blue hanging banners and Islamic architectural details. The ground is paved with patterned tiles, and merchants stand near piles of pink flowers. The character ascends the stone steps toward the entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior entrance hall with columns and patterned floors

events.description: character enters the building from the bright outdoor courtyard into dimmer interior
light increases as character approaches the interior courtyard exit

agents.ego_description: walking through the entrance hall toward an interior courtyard visible through an arched doorway at the far end

entered.detail: spacious hall with high ceilings and ornate wall carvings
thick sandstone columns with spiral fluting
intricate geometric mosaic tile pattern in earth tones
red cushioned benches against the walls
large horseshoe arch leading to interior courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character enters the building, transitioning from bright sunlight to a dimmer interior entrance hall. The space features stone columns, patterned floor tiles, and wooden benches with red cushions. At the far end, an arched doorway frames a view of a lush interior courtyard with green curtains and palm trees visible beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior courtyard with palm trees, flower petals, and green curtains

events.description: character emerges from interior hall into open-air courtyard with palm trees
character stops and looks up at the upper balconies and architecture

agents.ego_description: emerging into the serene interior courtyard, looking up at the ornate two-story architecture and walking among palm trees scattered with pink flower petals

notable_agents.action: woman in black robes sweeping flower petals with a straw broom

entered.detail: enclosed courtyard open to sky surrounded by two-story building
tall date palms with green fronds
heavy emerald fabric drapes hanging between columns
scattered pink and white flower petals covering the stone floor
second-floor wooden balconies with carved screens
brass lanterns suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a beautiful interior courtyard filled with palm trees and scattered flower petals. Green curtains hang between ornate stone columns, and the upper floor features wooden balconies with carved screens. The character pauses to look up at the architecture before continuing to explore the space where a woman sweeps petals in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkways and corridors surrounding the courtyard

events.description: character enters covered corridor leaving the open courtyard
lighting dims as character moves deeper into covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through shaded covered corridors with stone columns and potted plants, moving toward interior doorways

entered.detail: roofed walkway with stone arches and columns
large ceramic pots with green shrubs
simple wooden bench with red cushion

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open courtyard into covered walkways with stone columns and potted plants. The lighting becomes dimmer and more shadowed as the character explores the perimeter corridors, passing wooden benches and approaching doorways leading to other interior spaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined sandstone alleyway into the expansive, ornate interior of a grand building. It begins in a narrow stone street flanked by high walls and palm fronds, moving forward as the space opens into a bright courtyard centered around a fountain and populated by pedestrians. As the character advances across patterned tiles, the scene shifts toward a grand entrance adorned with blue banners and piles of pink flowers before ascending a set of stone steps. The camera then transitions from the brilliant sunlight into a dimmer interior hall characterized by stone columns and red-cushioned benches, finally framing a view of a lush, curtained garden courtyard through a distant arched doorway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open interior courtyard into the dim, shadowed confines of surrounding covered walkways. It begins in a sunlit space filled with palm trees and scattered flower petals, where the camera captures green curtains draped between ornate stone columns and carved wooden balconies above. As the character pauses to admire the architecture and passes a woman sweeping the ground, the movement carries forward toward the perimeter of the courtyard. The scene then shifts from the open air into the cool shade of stone corridors, where the lighting softens and the environment narrows. Finally, the camera glides past potted plants and wooden benches, moving deeper into the shadowed walkways toward various interior doorways.
